context: The video shows a huge cargo ship arriving near a working harbor while dock workers unload containers in the foreground.

actions.description: The massive silver cargo ship enters the frame across calm sunset-lit water.
Foreground workers move between containers as the ship glides behind them and seagulls circle overhead.
The sunset reflection stretches across the harbor while the ship's silhouette grows more dramatic.
